workflow.name: 磁盘空间统计-表模型基础功能
workflow.description: IoTDB v2.0.9.1 磁盘空间占用统计功能测试 — 表模型基础查询（用例 1-6）。覆盖 table_disk_usage 系统表的基本查询、WHERE 过滤、GROUP BY 聚合、空结果集、空数据库、视图查询。

sqls: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS db_g_0
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS test1
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS empty_db
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS viewdb
USE db_g_0
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1 (d_0 TAG TEXT, s_0 INT32, s_1 INT64, s_2 FLOAT, s_3 DOUBLE, s_4 TEXT)
INSERT INTO t1 (time, d_0, s_0, s_1, s_2, s_3, s_4) VALUES (1, 'dev_0', 100, 1000, 1.1, 2.2, 'hello')
INSERT INTO t1 (time, d_0, s_0, s_1, s_2, s_3, s_4) VALUES (2, 'dev_1', 200, 2000, 3.3, 4.4, 'world')
INSERT INTO t1 (time, d_0, s_0, s_1, s_2, s_3, s_4) VALUES (3, 'dev_0', 300, 3000, 5.5, 6.6, 'test')
USE test1
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1 (d_0 TAG TEXT, s_0 INT32)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t2 (d_0 TAG TEXT, s_0 INT32)
INSERT INTO t1 (time, d_0, s_0) VALUES (1, 'a', 1)
INSERT INTO t2 (time, d_0, s_0) VALUES (1, 'b', 2)
FLUSH
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage WHERE database = 'test1'
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage WHERE table_name = 't1'
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage WHERE database = 'test1' AND table_name = 't1'
SELECT database, table_name, SUM(size_in_bytes) AS total_size_in_bytes FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage GROUP BY database, table_name
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage WHERE table_name = 'non_existent_table'
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage WHERE database = 'empty_db'
SELECT * FROM information_schema.table_disk_usage WHERE table_name = 't1' AND database = 'viewdb'
